languages.text: "Пожалуйста, помогите моему сыну, во имя {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Золотого Трона{/g}, я знаю, вы можете! Гнотек столькое стерпел..." {n}Лицо немолодой женщины-ветерана со средних палуб искажено горем. Каждое ее слово срывается в протяжный стон.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Пожалуйста, помогите моему сыну, во имя {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Золотого Трона{/g}, я знаю, вы можете! Гнотек столькое стерпел..." {n}Лицо немолодой женщины, бойца со средних палуб, искажено горем, каждое ее слово звучит как стон.{/n}

languages.text: "Please help my son, in the name of the {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Golden Throne{/g}, I know you can! Gnotec has endured so much..." {n}The lined face of the middle-deck veteran is contorted with grief. Every word she speaks comes out in a long moan.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Пожалуйста, помогите моему сыну, во имя {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Золотого Трона{/g}, я знаю, вы можете! Гнотек столькое стерпел..." {n}Лицо немолодой женщины-ветерана со средних палуб искажено горем. Каждое ее слово срывается в протяжный стон.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Please help my son, in the name of the {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Golden Throne{/g}, I know you can! Gnotec has endured so much..." {n}The lined face of the middle-deck veteran is contorted with grief. Every word she speaks comes out in a long moan.{/n}

"Please help my son, in the name of the {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Golden Throne{/g}, I know you can! Gnotec has endured so much..." {n}The lined face of the middle-deck veteran is contorted with grief. Every word she speaks comes out in a long moan.{/n}

"Please help my son, in the name of the {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Golden Throne{/g}, I know you can! Gnotec has endured so much..." {n}The lined face of the middle-deck veteran is contorted with grief. Every word she speaks comes out in a long moan.{/n}

languages.text: "Bitte helft meinem Sohn. Im Namen des {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Goldenen Throns{/g}, ich weiß, das könnt Ihr! Gnotec musste so viel ertragen ..." {n}Das verhärmte Gesicht der Mitteldeck-Veteranin ist voller Trauer. Jedes Wort, das sie sagt, gleicht einem langen Seufzen.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Please help my son, in the name of the {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Golden Throne{/g}, I know you can! Gnotec has endured so much..." {n}The lined face of the middle-deck veteran is contorted with grief. Every word she speaks comes out in a long moan.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Bitte helft meinem Sohn. Im Namen des {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Goldenen Throns{/g}, ich weiß, das könnt Ihr! Gnotec musste so viel ertragen ..." {n}Das verhärmte Gesicht der Mitteldeck-Veteranin ist voller Trauer. Jedes Wort, das sie sagt, gleicht einem langen Seufzen.{/n}

languages.text: « Je vous en conjure au nom du {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Trône d'Or{/g}, aidez mon fils, je sais que vous en êtes capable ! Gnotec a tellement souffert... » {n}Le visage ridé de l'ancienne combattante des ponts intermédiaires est déformé par le chagrin. Chaque mot qu'elle prononce s'accompagne d'un long gémissement.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Please help my son, in the name of the {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Golden Throne{/g}, I know you can! Gnotec has endured so much..." {n}The lined face of the middle-deck veteran is contorted with grief. Every word she speaks comes out in a long moan.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Je vous en conjure au nom du {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Trône d'Or{/g}, aidez mon fils, je sais que vous en êtes capable ! Gnotec a tellement souffert... » {n}Le visage ridé de l'ancienne combattante des ponts intermédiaires est déformé par le chagrin. Chaque mot qu'elle prononce s'accompagne d'un long gémissement.{/n}

languages.text: “求您救救我儿子，{g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}黄金王座{/g}在上，我知道您一定做得到！诺泰克遭了太多罪了……”{n}这位中层甲板老兵那布满皱纹的脸因悲痛而扭曲，她吐出的每一个字，都化作长长的呻吟。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Please help my son, in the name of the {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Golden Throne{/g}, I know you can! Gnotec has endured so much..." {n}The lined face of the middle-deck veteran is contorted with grief. Every word she speaks comes out in a long moan.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “求您救救我儿子，{g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}黄金王座{/g}在上，我知道您一定做得到！诺泰克遭了太多罪了……”{n}这位中层甲板老兵那布满皱纹的脸因悲痛而扭曲，她吐出的每一个字，都化作长长的呻吟。{/n}

languages.text: «Por favor, en nombre del {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Trono Dorado{/g}, ayude a mi hijo, ¡sé que puede! Gnotec ya ha sufrido mucho...». {n}El ajado rostro de la veterana de las cubiertas intermedias está lleno de pesar. Cada palabra que pronuncia es un largo gemido.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Please help my son, in the name of the {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Golden Throne{/g}, I know you can! Gnotec has endured so much..." {n}The lined face of the middle-deck veteran is contorted with grief. Every word she speaks comes out in a long moan.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Por favor, en nombre del {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Trono Dorado{/g}, ayude a mi hijo, ¡sé que puede! Gnotec ya ha sufrido mucho...». {n}El ajado rostro de la veterana de las cubiertas intermedias está lleno de pesar. Cada palabra que pronuncia es un largo gemido.{/n}

languages.text: "どうか息子を助けてください。{g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}ザ・ゴールデン・スローン{/g} の名において、あなたならできると信じています！グノテックは多くのことに耐えてきました..."{n}ミドルデックのファイターである若くはない女性の顔は悲しみに歪み、その一言一言がうめき声のように響く。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Please help my son, in the name of {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}the Golden Throne{/g}, I know you can! Gnotek has endured so much..." {n}The face of the not-young woman, a fighter from the middle decks, is contorted with grief, her every word sounding like a groan.{/n}

languages.text: "{g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Altın Taht{/g} aşkına, ne olur oğluma yardım edin. Yapabileceğinizi biliyorum! Gnotec öyle çok acı çekti ki..." {n}Orta güverte emektarının çizgili yüzü, kederle kasılmış. Söylediği her kelime uzun bir inilti gibi çıkıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Please help my son, in the name of the {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Golden Throne{/g}, I know you can! Gnotec has endured so much..." {n}The lined face of the middle-deck veteran is contorted with grief. Every word she speaks comes out in a long moan.{/n}
